title: Card
description: One Wire story card, written by the analyst/verifier and published to content/cards/<id>.json. Field list is spec sec-5 verbatim: {id, date, headline, what_happened, why_it_matters, one_liner, topics[], status, citations:[{url,outlet,quote}], lexicon_terms[], generated_at, model, correction_note?}. Phase 1 ships this schema only -- no cards exist until the Phase 2 analyst runs.

id.description: Stable slug, e.g. '2026-07-09-gpt-5-5-release'. Pre-computed by scripts/plan_run.py in Phase 2 so the analyst never invents/collides IDs.

date.description: Calendar day (YYYY-MM-DD) this card belongs to on the Wire.

status.description: The corroboration-rule outcome: confirmed (primary source OR two independent reputable outlets), reported (visible sourcing but not corroboration-rule strength), corrected (a published correction changed the record -- see correction_note).

quote.description: Supporting quote, spec cap: <=15 words, max one per source.

lexicon_terms.description: Lexicon terms used in this card, for auto-linking and the lexicon's seen_in[] back-reference.

model.description: Model identifier that generated this card, e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-5'.

correction_note.description: Optional short pointer to the content/corrections.json entry that corrected this card. Present only when status is 'corrected'.
